hosts.name: google-ai-studio
hosts.description: Google AI Studio's OpenAI-compatible endpoint for Gemini models. Accepts OpenAI-shaped chat completions requests at the /v1beta/openai base path, covering streaming, structured outputs, function calling, and vision. This compatibility layer is currently in beta per Google's documentation.

hosts.name: ollama-cloud
hosts.description: Ollama's managed cloud service. Requires an Ollama Cloud API key.

hosts.name: ollama-self
hosts.description: Operator-run Ollama instance. baseURL is per-deployment; the catalog ships an empty default that the operator must configure.

hosts.name: opencode-zen
hosts.description: OpenCode's curated model gateway. OpenAI-compatible endpoint at /v1/chat/completions; some models also expose /v1/messages (Anthropic shape) and /v1/responses. Authentication: Bearer $OPENCODE_API_KEY.

models.description: Mainstream cost-optimized model. Thinking is off by default but configurable up to 24K budget.
Newest cost-optimized lite model. Faster and cheaper than the 2.5 generation.
Preview variant of 3.1 Flash-Lite. Capabilities and pricing match the stable version.
Advanced intelligence for complex problem-solving. Currently in preview; replaces the shut-down gemini-3-pro-preview.
Google's most intelligent flash-tier model for sustained frontier performance on agentic and coding tasks.
Earlier-generation flash model in preview. Available via Google AI Studio (full capabilities) and Ollama (vision only).
Earlier-generation flash model in preview. Available via Google AI Studio (full capabilities) and Ollama (vision only).
Earlier-generation flash model in preview. Available via Google AI Studio (full capabilities) and Ollama (vision only).

providers.name: alibaba
providers.description: Alibaba — Qwen model family from Alibaba Cloud.

providers.name: deepseek
providers.description: DeepSeek — code and general-purpose language models from DeepSeek AI.

providers.name: internlm
providers.description: InternLM — language models from Shanghai AI Laboratory.

providers.name: meta
providers.description: Meta — Llama open-weight model family from Meta AI.

providers.name: mistral
providers.description: Mistral AI — open-weight and proprietary language models from Mistral.

providers.name: zhipuai
providers.description: Zhipu AI — CodeGeeX and GLM model family from Zhipu AI (Tsinghua THUDM).
